votes.rationale: This motion makes execution eligibility explicit in agency configuration and removes the semantic leak where governance agents could appear in governed execution assignment flows.

The change is appropriately scoped to config plus operator work surfaces, preserves backward compatibility, and surfaces invalid legacy role-assignee combinations instead of silently treating them as valid.
Unanimous consent satisfied. Governance and execution are now explicitly separated at the configuration layer, which is the right foundation before live autonomous runner rollout.
